---
title: "Clase 5: Programación Orientada a Objetos"
---

{{< downloadthis ../../notebooks/clase_05.ipynb dname=clase_05 label="Descargar Notebook" icon=journal-code type=default class=data-button id=clase_05 >}}

<iframe
  src="https://tomicapretto.com/jupyter-lite-site/notebooks/?path=pp/clase_05.ipynb"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  style="border: 1px solid #ddd;">
</iframe>
